name: Gandhi Memorial International School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. HBR Motik Blok D6 Kav. 1, Kemayoran, Jakarta Pusat 10630, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: One of Jakarta's oldest internationals (est. 1950). Indian heritage, affordable fees. Central location near Kemayoran.
paragraphs: One of Jakarta's oldest internationals (est. 1950). Indian heritage, affordable fees. Central location near Kemayoran.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3K – US$8.6K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus in Kemayoran, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Library, Sports facilities.

metaDescription: Gandhi Memorial International School (Central Jakarta). One of Jakarta's oldest internationals (est. 1950). Indian heritage, affordable fees. Central location near Kemayoran.…
